titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 143: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 143. (A.R. No. 286 of 1906.) TIRUMĀLPURAM, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, Central shrine, Maṇikaṇṭhēśvara temple.

It states that while the king was staying in his palace at Kachchippēḍu it was represented to him through the officer Śōḻa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ, the village Siṟṟiyāṟṟūr, in Maṇayil-nāḍu, a division of Maṇaiyil-kōṭṭam had been granted after excluding the kāṇi (land) of Saṅkappāḍikiḻāṉ, in the 21st year of Toṇḍaimānāṟṟūr-tuñjina-uḍaiyār (892 A.D. Āditya I), as dēvadāna-brahmadēya to the sabhā of Puduppākkam in Puriśai-nāḍu in the same kōṭṭam, with the stipulation that they were to pay as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili to the temple of Tirumālper-uḍaiyār, 3000 kāḍi (of paddy) as puravu and 561 kāḍi as iravu in addition to 26(1/2) kaḻañju and a mañjāḍi to the god (Mahādēva) of Tirumālpeṟu. This order had been confirmed in the 4th year of Parakēsarivarman, who took Madurai and Īḻam viz., Parāntaka I (911 A.D.). However, in the thirty-sixth regnal year of Parāntaka I (943 A.D.) the puravu 3000 kāḍi of paddy (accrued out) of the kāṇi (land) of Saṅkappāḍikiḻāṉ was also given to the above temple at Tirumāṟpēṟu. But the sabhā of Puduppākkam misappropriated this and withhold the payment (of this tax) to the temple. The temple authorities therefore now appealed to the reigning king against this injustice. The latter thereupon sent for the complainants and the sabhā of Puduppākkam and after due enquiry into the matter passed orders to the sabhā to restore the payment in future to the temple, of the 3000 kāḍi also due on Saṅkappāḍi-kīḻāṇ's land in addition to their own original dues of the puravu and iravu in paddy and the cash payment they had been making. (Totally 6000 kāḍi as puravu, 561 kāḍi as iravu and 26(1/2) kaḻañju and a mañjāḍi of gold.) It was also ordered that this has to be entered in the taxregisters and the order was issued to the temple authorities by the king's officers including Parakēsari Mūvēndavēḷāṉ and Sembiyan Uttaramantri.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. III No. 142. S.I.I., Vol. XXII No. 286.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṉoriṉ ( I
ṉ) maiykoṇṭāṉ maṇai
yilkoṭṭattu maṇaiyilnāṭ
ṭārkkum brahmateyak ki
ḻavarkkum tevatāṉap
paḷḷiccantak kaṇimuṟṟu
ṭṭu veṭṭappeṟṟūrkaḷilā
rkkum nakaraṅkaḷilaārkkum yāṇṭu 10 4
Āvatu naThe Letter ‘na’ stands for nāḷ • 2 100 10 6 ṉāl kaccippe
ṭṭu nam viṭṭinuḷḷālp poṉmāḷikai
Ātipūmiyil nāmirukkac coḻamuven
taveḷāṉ tirumālppeṟṟu ma(ā)hādeva
ṟkku maṇaiyilkkoṭṭattu maṇaiyilnāṭṭu
cciṟṟiyāṟṟūr caṅkappāṭikiḻāṉ kāṇinik
kip puravu muvāyirakkāṭiyum Iravu
Aiññūṟṟu Aṟupattoru kāṭiyum poṉ Irupattaṟu kaḻa
ñcaraiye mañcāṭiyun tevatāṉa Iṟai
yiliyāy Ippuravum Iravum poṉ
ṉum tevarkku Iṟuppatāka Ikkoṭṭattup puricainā
ṭṭup pirahmateyap putuppākkattu sabhaiyāṟkkut te
vatāṉa brahmatecamākat toṇṭaimāṉāṟṟūrt tuñciṉa Uṭai
yāṟkku Irupattoṉṟāvatu kuṭuttu Irupattiraṇṭāvatu piṭā
kai naṭantu śāsanam ceytu koṭuttu variiliṭāteykiṭa
nta Ivvūrai matiraiyum Īḻamuṅkoṇṭa kopparakeca
ripanmaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu tevatāṉabrahmadeyamāka vari
yiliṭṭa Itaṉāl puravum Iravum poṉṉum putuppā
kkattu sabhaiyārey tevaṟkku Iṟuttuvaārā niṉṟā
rkaḷ Icciṟṟiyāṟṟūr caṅkappāṭikiḻāṉ kāṇiyāl mu
talāy varukiṉṟa puravu muvāyirakkāṭiyum matiraiyum Īḻamu
ṅkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu muppattāṟāvatu
tirumāṟpeṟṟu mātevaṟkey tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyāka variyil
liṭṭu Ipparicu kuṭutta Iccaṅkappāṭikiḻāṉ kāṇiyaip [ putu
p] pākkattu sabhaiyār paṟṟiyuṇṭu tevarkku yiṟaiyiṟātoḻi
kiṉṟārkaḷeṉṟu tevakaṉmikaḷum Uṇṇāḻikaiyuṭai
yārum paṉmāyeśvararum vantu Aṉiyāyamiṭukiṉṟārkaḷ Eṉ
ṟu namakkuc colla tirumālpeṟṟit tevakaṉmikaḷ Uṇṇā
ḻikai Uṭaiyārkaḷaiyum paṉmāyeśvararaiyum putuppākkattu sa
bhaiyāraiyum Aḻaittu nām Ārāynta Iṭattu
putuppākkattu sa
bhaiyār ciṟṟiyāṟṟū
rc caṅkappāṭikiḻā
ṉ kāṇiyāl tevarkku
Iṟaiyiṟātey tevatā
ṉaṅkaḷai Aṉupavittu
varukiṉṟamaiy Icai
ntamaiyil putuppākka
ttu sabhaiyārait ta
ṇṭaṅ koṇṭu Icca
ṅkappāṭikiḻāṉ kāṇi
yāl puravu muvāyirakkāṭiyum tirumālpeṟṟu mā
tevarkkup putuppākkattu sabhaiyārey Iṟuppa
tāka Ivarkaḷukke yāṇṭu 10 4 Āvatu mutal teva
tāṉappirahmateyamāy Itaṉāl puravu muvāyirak kāṭi
yum ciṟṟiyāṟṟu Ūrāl muṉṉiṟuttu varukiṉṟa puravu muvā
yirak kāṭiyum Iravu Aiññūṟṟu Aṟupattoru kāṭiyum
poṉṉiruppattaṟu kaḻañcaraiye mañcāṭiyum Ākap puravu
Āṟāyirak kāṭiyum Iravu Aiññūṟṟu Aṟupattoru kāṭiyum
poṉ Irupattu Aṟukaḻañcaraiye mañcāṭiyun tirumāl
peṟṟu mātevarkkup putuppākkattu sabhaiyār Iṟuppatākat
tevatāna brahmateyamāy Iṟaiyiliyāka variyiliṭṭuk koḷka
veṉṟu nāñ colla naṅ karumamārāykiṉṟa paruttikkuṭaiyā
ṉ kotukulavaṉ cāttanāṉa parakecarimuventaveḷā
ṉum naṭuvirukkaip payalait tiyampaka paṭṭanum cikkaruṭai
yāṉ nakkan kaṇiccaṉāṉa coḻamuven=ta veḷānum
Āṇattiyum vāykkeḻviyumāyk keṭṭu nam Olaiye
ḻutum Aṇṇāṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ Uttaramantiri paṭṭālakaṉeḻu
ttiṉālum nam Olaināyakaṉ coḻamuven=taveḷāṉ
Oppiṉālum pukkat tiṭṭiṉpaṭi variyiliṭṭuk koḷka ve
ṉṟu naṅ karumamārāykiṉṟa parakecarimuventaveḷā
(ṉ) nevappuravuvaric cempiyaṉ Uttaraman=tiriyā
ṉa Iṟaiyāṉ ku
ṭit talaimakaṉ ta
ṇṭipūtiyum pavva
ttirik kiḻavaṉ Aṭi
kaḷ nakkaṉum pe
raraicūruṭaiyā(ṉ)
nāṉa Utaiyativā
karaṉum virāparaṇamu
ventaveḷāṉāṉa
kaḻaṉivāyiluṭai
yāṉ veṉṟāṉ
kaṟpakamum varip
pottakam tirunā
lūr kiḻavaṉ tāḻi ca
n=tiracekaraṉum muka
veṭṭi paḻaṉakkuṭai
yāṉ Araiyāṉ
yilum vittāruṭai
yāṉ Aṭikaḷ vi
racoḻaṉum Iṟai
yāṉceri Uṭaiyā
ṉ paṅkaṉ kaṭampaṉu
m mukkuṟumpuṭai
yāṉ kiruḻ(ṇ)ṇaṉ
Irācātittaṉum
toṇṭaināṭṭu
ppuravuvaric cā
ttaṉūruṭaiyāṉ ni
ṉṟāṉakkaṉum ci
ṟukuṭaiyāṉ Arai
yaṉ civakkoḻun
tum cempākkamuṭaiyā
ṉ kuṉṟāṭi tiruppo
riyum va
rippot
taka kaṇakku
meṉāraṇa ma
ṅkala[ muṭai
yāṉ]
yāṉ ṟāḻi
yum neṟkku
ṉṟa muṭaiyā
ṉ parañco
ti paṭṭālakaṉu
m variyilli
(ṭ)ṭu Uṭaiyūru
ṭaiyāṉ cuva
raṉ cāttaṉum
paṭṭolaik kuṟicciyuṭaiyāṉ
Irācaviṉaiyāparaṇaṉum Iruntu yāṇ
ṭu 10 4 Āvatu nāḷ 2 10 18 ṉāl tirumāṟ
peṟṟu ma(ā)hādevar tevatāṉamiṟaiyili
yāṉa taṅkaḷ nāṭṭuc ciṟṟiyāṟṟūr caṅkappā
ṭikiḻāṉ kāṇiyāl puravu muvāyirakkā
ṭiyum puricai nāṭṭu brahmateyam putu
ppākkattu sabhaiyāre Iṟuppatā
ka Ivarkaḷukku tevatāṉa brahmadeya
māy Itaṉāl puravu muvāyirakkāṭi
yum ciṟṟiyāṟṟūrāre Ivarkaḷ muṉ
ṉiṟuttu varukiṉṟa puravu muvāyirak
kāṭiyum Iravu Aiññūṟṟu Aṟupat
toru kāṭiyum poṉ Irupattaṟu kaḻa
ñcaraiye mañcāṭiyum Āka nel
lu Āṟāyirattaññūṟṟu Aṟupa
ttoru kāṭiyum poṉ nirupattaṟu kaḻa
ñcaraiye mañcāṭiyum tirumāl
peṟṟu mahātevarkku putuppākka
ttu sabhaiyāre Iṟuppatāka I
varkaḷukkut tevatāṉa brahma
teyam variyiliṭṭuk kuṭu
ttom Ivai Ā
tittaṉ Āṉa miṉavaṉ muventa
veḷāṉeḻuttu
ṭaiyāṉ nakkaṉ
coḻamuventa
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
